summary: Iteration 3 testing completed successfully. All 4 new features verified and working: 1) Video upload from gallery/camera in face swap, 2) Multi-face selection with face grid UI, 3) Video download to device storage, 4) Video recording in-app. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements, navigation, and new features working correctly (100%).
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ New endpoint POST /api/upload-video accepts video files and returns file_path
✓ New endpoint GET /api/download-video proxies video download for device storage
✓ Face swap model correctly updated to accept source_image_paths (array) and target_video_path
✓ Face swap correctly tracks face_count in project model
✓ Face Swap UI correctly replaced URL input with video picker (Gallery + Record Video buttons)
✓ Face Swap UI has multi-face upload grid with add/remove face functionality
✓ Face Swap create button shows face count (e.g., 'Start Face Swap (0 faces)')
✓ Projects modal shows 'Save to Device' and 'Open Video' buttons for completed projects
✓ Video download uses expo-file-system and expo-media-library correctly
✓ All testID attributes present on new interactive elements
✓ Navigation between all screens working correctly
Minor: expo-image-picker MediaTypeOptions deprecation warning (not critical)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI elements, new features, and navigation working correctly)

seed_data_creation: Test projects created during backend testing for lip sync and face swap (single and multi-face). One completed face swap project exists in database for testing download functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features tested and verified working: 1) Face swap video upload from gallery/camera (replaced URL input), 2) Multi-face selection (array of faces, face grid UI with add/remove), 3) Video download to device (Save to Device button, expo-file-system + expo-media-library, backend proxy), 4) Video recording in-app (Record Video button). Backend model updated to source_image_paths (array) and target_video_path. All endpoints tested including new /api/upload-video and /api/download-video. Projects modal correctly shows download/open buttons only for completed projects. Face count displayed on create button. No issues found.
rca_of_issue: N/A - No issues found. All new features working as expected.
